english: Om, salutations to the Goddess who is of the nature of reflection

hindi: ॐ शिव उवाच: शृणु देवि प्रवक्ष्यामि कीलकं सर्वसिद्धिदम्।
english: Om, Shiva said: Listen O Goddess, I will declare the Kilaka that grants all perfections
roman: Om Shiva Uvacha: Shrunu Devi pravakshyami Kilakam sarva siddhi dam

english: By the mere knowledge of which one gets the fruit of reading the Durga Saptashati
roman: Yasya gnana matrena Durga patha phalam labhet

hindi: स्तोत्रं वै चण्डिकायाः तु प्रच्छन्नं यत्प्रकाशितम्॥
english: This hidden Stotram of Chandika is now revealed
roman: Stotram vai Chandikayah tu prachchhannam yat prakashitam

english: O Goddess, I have told you this supreme secret
roman: Etat te kathitam Devi sarva rahasyam uttamam

english: The forgiveness of offenses against the Goddess, bestower of all perfections
roman: Devya aparadha kshampanam sarva siddhi pradayakam

english: Thus the Keelaka Stotram of the Goddess is complete

hindi: यः पठेत् सततं भक्त्या स सिद्धिं परमां लभेत्॥
english: Whoever reads it always with devotion attains the highest perfection
roman: Yah pathet satatam bhaktya sa siddhim paramam labhet
